description_long: This fence is constructed from a series of vertical, rectangular posts set between two thick horizontal rails, all featuring a consistent, rust-colored metallic texture. The vertical posts are evenly spaced, creating wide gaps that allow visibility and airflow while still serving as a barrier. The base of the fence is solid and robust, with a double-layered plinth that adds stability and visual weight. The top edge of the fence is flat and unadorned, matching the simple, utilitarian design. There are no decorative elements or post caps, emphasizing function over ornamentation. The overall appearance suggests durability and suitability for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots.
description: A sturdy, rust-colored metal fence with evenly spaced vertical posts and a double-layered base, featuring a flat top and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing six vertical posts, wide gaps, and the double-layered base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the posts and the depth of the double-layered base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same post arrangement and base structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the depth and solid construction of the base.
